title: Is documentation gone?
excerpt:
Hello, the following site used to have documentation about the API but it shows empty for me https://monday.com/developers/v2 
Perhaps there is some rendering issue? Clicking on “Documentation” does nothing for me.

posts.author: mitko-slapdash (Mitko Simeonov)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, the following site used to have documentation about the API but it shows empty for me https://monday.com/developers/v2

Perhaps there is some rendering issue? Clicking on “Documentation” does nothing for me.

Screen Shot 2020-09-01 at 10.24.17 PM2842×1092 375 KB

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mitko-slapdash

Thanks for reaching out about this one! That does seem quite odd.

To be transparent with you, I’ve just tried to open the documentation page on an incognito mode window and everything seems to be loading fine for me. Is there any chance your browser’s cache, extensions, or network are at play here?

-Alex

posts.author: mitko-slapdash (Mitko Simeonov)
posts.cookedHtml: @AlexSavchuk - thanks. I just tried again this morning and the site loads perfectly fine, even without incognito.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@mitko-slapdash

Awesome, I’m glad to hear that everything seems back to normal!

-Alex

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
